ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the personnel */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the personnel */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rank of the personnel */,
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the residence of the personnel */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the personnel */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Notable remarks or events associated with the personnel */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the personnel */,
  "date_of_enlistment" TEXT /* Date of enlistment of the personnel */,
  "date_of_discharge" TEXT /* Date of discharge of the personnel */,
  "service_branch" TEXT /* Service branch of the personnel (e.g., Army, Navy) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for a portrait or image of the personnel */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or additional personal history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_residence_id FOREIGN KEY ("residence_id") REFERENCES residences ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., CPL, PVT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "service_branch" TEXT /* Service branch of the rank (e.g., Army, Navy) */,
  "rank_order" INTEGER /* Hierarchical order of the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence */,
  "residence_name" TEXT /* Name of the residence (e.g., Waynesville OH) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the residence */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the residence */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Farmer, Sailor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry related to the occupation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the occupation was primarily performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the personnel associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Battle, Award, Wound) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
